author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 3 APPROVE (clean). conformance_serialize.rs:1748 onnx_ir_graph_to_onnx now calls assert_onnx_discriminating which asserts ir_version value byte (0x08), size > 32, model_name substring (ferrotorch_model), value-name substrings (val_0/val_1), op-type substring (Add), and a sabotage-probe negative (sabotage_marker NOT in bytes). Existing bytes[0]==0x08 retained. Sabotage-probe demo: vec![0x08; 200] stub FAILS at model_name discriminator (line 1709). No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
